---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Daniel Höhn"
date: '`r Sys.Date()`'
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(viridis)
```

```{r}
test = read_csv("../build/peaktest.csv")
test_fail = test[which(test$dqs == -1),]
test =  test[which(test$dqs > 0),] |> drop_na()

sum(test$closedPeak == F) # no positive coefficients when working with single peaks!


hist(test$d_area_rel, breaks = 20)
hist(test$d_fwhm_rel, breaks = 20)
hist(test$d_height_rel, breaks = 20)
hist(test$d_apex_abs, breaks = 20) # relative apex position does not make sense!

# height should probably not be used for quality estimation since it is influenced
# both by tau and sdev. 
ggplot(data = test)+
    aes(x = height)+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_area_rel), colour = "red2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_height_rel), colour = "orange")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_fwhm_rel), colour = "green2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_apex_abs), colour = "blue3")

ggplot(data = test)+
    aes(x = sdev)+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_area_rel), colour = "red2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_height_rel), colour = "orange")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_fwhm_rel), colour = "green2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_apex_abs), colour = "blue3")

ggplot(data = test)+
    aes(x = tau)+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_area_rel), colour = "red2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_height_rel), colour = "orange")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_fwhm_rel), colour = "green2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_apex_abs), colour = "blue3")

# DQS is not a useful predictor of peak quality
ggplot(data = test)+
    aes(x = dqs)+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_area_rel), colour = "red2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_height_rel), colour = "orange")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_fwhm_rel), colour = "green2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_apex_abs), colour = "blue3")

ggplot(data = test)+
    aes(x = jaccard)+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_area_rel), colour = "red2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_height_rel), colour = "orange")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_fwhm_rel), colour = "green2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_apex_abs), colour = "blue3")

################################################################################

ggplot(data = test) +
    aes(sdev, tau)+
    geom_tile(aes(fill = d_area_rel))+
    scale_fill_viridis(discrete=FALSE, option = "turbo")

ggplot(data = test) +
    aes(sdev, tau)+
    geom_tile(aes(fill = d_height_rel))+
    scale_fill_viridis(discrete=FALSE, option = "turbo")

ggplot(data = test) +
    aes(sdev, tau)+
    geom_tile(aes(fill = d_fwhm_rel))+
    scale_fill_viridis(discrete=FALSE, option = "turbo")

ggplot(data = test) +
    aes(sdev, tau)+
    geom_tile(aes(fill = d_apex_abs))+
    scale_fill_viridis(discrete=FALSE, option = "turbo")
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = test)+
    aes(x = jaccard)+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_area_rel), colour = "red2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_height_rel), colour = "orange")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_fwhm_rel), colour = "green2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_apex_abs), colour = "blue3")

ggplot(data = test)+
    aes(x = jaccard)+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_area_rel), colour = "red2")

ggplot(data = test)+
    aes(x = jaccard)+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_height_rel), colour = "orange")

ggplot(data = test)+
    aes(x = jaccard)+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_fwhm_rel), colour = "green2")

ggplot(data = test)+
    aes(x = jaccard)+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_apex_abs), colour = "blue3")

ggplot(data = test)+
    aes(x = d_area_rel)+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_height_rel), colour = "orange")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_fwhm_rel), colour = "green2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_apex_abs), colour = "blue3")

ggplot(data = test)+
    aes(x = d_height_rel)+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_area_rel), colour = "red2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_fwhm_rel), colour = "green2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_apex_abs), colour = "blue3")

ggplot(data = test)+
    aes(x = d_fwhm_rel)+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_area_rel), colour = "red2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_height_rel), colour = "orange")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_apex_abs), colour = "blue3")

ggplot(data = test)+
    aes(x = d_apex_abs)+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_area_rel), colour = "red2")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_height_rel), colour = "orange")+
    geom_point(aes(y = d_fwhm_rel), colour = "green2")


```
